Home / Services / Custom Metalwork

Custom Metalwork

Bring your unique vision to life with custom metal fabrication.

IRONCRAFT offers custom metalwork services for residential and commercial clients in Chicago. If you have a unique design or project that requires metal fabrication, we can help. We work with a variety of metals, including steel, aluminum, and wrought iron. Our skilled craftsmen can create everything from custom furniture and decorative elements to structural components and architectural details. We work closely with our clients to understand their vision and bring it to life. We use the latest technology and techniques to ensure precision and quality. Whether you need a custom railing for your penthouse in Streeterville or a unique metal sculpture for your garden in Oak Park, we can deliver exceptional results. We provide free consultations and estimates.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Design Consultation – We discuss your needs and create a detailed design.
  2. 02 Step 2: Material Selection – We help you choose the best metal for your project.
  3. 03 Step 3: Fabrication – Our experienced craftsmen fabricate your metalwork.
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing and Installation – We finish and install your custom piece.

Benefits

  • Unique Design
  • High-Quality Materials
  • Expert Craftsmanship
  • Personalized Service

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of metal can you work with?

We work with a variety of metals, including steel, aluminum, stainless steel, and wrought iron.

What is the typical turnaround time for a custom metalwork project?

Turnaround time depends on the complexity of the project. We will provide you with an estimated timeline during the consultation.

Do you offer delivery and installation services?

Yes, we offer delivery and installation services for all of our custom metalwork projects.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with custom metalwork? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: +17738177737
